programmes.show_description: Vaulted Secrets. Amy, Adam and Chip investigate a restaurant once used as a makeshift morgue. A powerful poltergeist is rumoured to haunt the building. S4, Ep6
Allergic To Light. Fatima is allergic to light and even indoors must take precautions to avoid succumbing to skin cancer. Amar's face has been destroyed by a bony tumour. S6, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Boy With No Eyes: Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: Boy With No Eyes. Mahesh weighs 150kg, twice the weight of an average man, due to a syndrome that encourages constant eating. A development in the womb left Christian with no eyes. S6, Ep7

Inflated Egos. The buyers return to Georgia, but this time take their auction battle out of Atlanta to the city of Commerce. Artefacts and iconic advertising pieces are up for grabs. S4, Ep2
Intergalactic Bounty. An eclectic mix of items calls to the buyers, drawing them back once again to do battle in Nashville. Items include a box full of license plates. S4, Ep3
Greedy Pig. The buyers head south again, this time to the affluent Atlanta suburb of Alpharetta, seeking valuable items at a local Man Cave auction. But who will come away happy? S4, Ep6
Walk the Plank. Super Auctions collects some of the most iconic items from Orlando's star attractions and sells them to the highest bidder. How will the buyers get on? S4, Ep7
It's Not Easy Making Green. The buyers have travelled to Allentown in search of old money. Items up for grabs today include rare Civil War-era objects from Gettysburg. S4, Ep8
Dino Mite. Vintage advertising pits the buyers against each other in Knoxville, where Sally spends big to win a dinosaur. Meanwhile, Billy's attempt at sabotage backfires. S4, Ep9
Big Boy Bucks. The buyers take a gamble on vintage casino and advertising items, including a Bob's Big Boy statue in Vegas. Meanwhile, a rare Elvis recording could pay off big time. S4, Ep10
Gunning for Dollars. A giant Gatling gun and a rare advertising piece from Nabisco Cookies are among the items that interest the buyers at a gambling auction in Las Vegas. S4, Ep11
The Wizard of Odd. A lost property auction in reveals an old-school boom box from the 1980s, while a buyer is over the rainbow about a rare 'Wizard of Oz' piece in a sealed trunk. S4, Ep12
Safari Sale. The buyers visit South Africa for a once-in-a-lifetime auction, and Billy appraises a ceremonial mask. Will profit still be made outside the specialist's comfort zone? S4, Ep13
Let The Good Times Roll. The Cars' drummer David Robinson rolls into F40 with a restoration job on a rare 1969 De Tomaso Mangusta. How will they shake it up with this classic ride? S11, Ep9
Eclectic Avenue. During a hunt for the perfect '32 Ford, Wayne finds a vintage ice-cutting machine with a motorcycle body and engine. Plus, he uncovers a Bugatti Type 55s replica. S11, Ep10
Grapevine Automotive. Richard Rawlings and Chris Stephens invest in failing garage, Grapevine Automotive, just outside Dallas - but they have less than a week to overhaul the shop. S1, Ep1
Scotty's Automotive. Richard Rawlings invests in a struggling garage, Scotty's Automotive, in Texas. The owner must break his hoarding ways for Richard to make his money back. S1, Ep2
Little Red Corvette. Lloyd Carney is an engineer and gear head with an extensive car collection full of classics, but there is something missing. Can Dave and the crew help? S5, Ep12
The Last Mopar. An old client, Vinnie, was blown away by the work Dave and the team did on his Charger. Now he's back for their help building the greatest Mopar on the planet. S5, Ep13
The Kindig Coronet. The '67 Coronet build continues. Vinnie wanted to go all out on this build and Dave has done some of his most innovative design work to date. S5, Ep14
Caleb's Corvette Part 2. The '56 Corvette is completed, with a couple of twists. The family has decided to change the colour from red to arctic blue with a silver teardrop. S2, Ep9
Ford Vs. Shorty: The Texas Torino. Shorty's is traditionally a Chevy shop, but this week, a Ford collector convinces them to take on his '71 Torino GT. S2, Ep10
The Search Begins. A team of specialists, armed with the latest technology, try to locate the fabled bigfoot. The start of their search takes them to the forests of Oregon. S1, Ep1
Did You Hear That? With a team member down, Russell and Mireya must forge ahead to hunt down leads. Their investigations uncover the first pieces of potential Bigfoot evidence. S1, Ep2
Mystery On Easter Island. Archaeologists use new digital technology to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement. S1, Ep3
Maze Of Cryptic Terror. Archaeologists use state-of-the-art digital technology to uncover the truth behind a cave wall in Nottinghamshire, England. What do the unusual symbols represent? S1, Ep4
Valley Of UFOs. Phil and Jess continue their investigation into Utah's Uintah Basin, where reports of UFO encounters have terrified locals. The team uncovers stunning new evidence. S4, Ep8
Hellfire Club. Phil and Jess travel to Ireland and the UK to investigate a centuries-old secret society whose members were known to practice satanic worship and ritual sacrifice. S4, Ep9
Beasts Of Britain. In England, Jess and Phil search for a legendary beast that's said to stalk the wilderness. After an encounter, they realise the creature is more than a myth. S4, Ep10

Steal Drum. The buyers are once again in Nashville, TN. Billy, Mark, Laurence and Sally have returned to Music City Auction for all the great items that always seem to be on offer. S4, Ep4
Monster Money. The buyers are in Hollywood for one of the largest movie monster memorabilia auctions of all time. Items include pieces from Frankenstein and Wolf Man movies. S4, Ep5
Clash Of The Titans. Shawn's crew are busy trying to reach the one thousand-ounce goal. Plus, the Kellys face howling winds and ripping currents as they move The Reaper into the sea. S8, Ep3
The Sound Of Money. Vernon and his crew get stranded in the Yukon. Shawn has a good luck charm in his son. Ken suffers a mechanical setback and Emily sends a rookie diver underwater. S8, Ep4
The Poseidon Crew hunts for bush gold. The Gold Gypsies face a tough decision. The Victoria Diggers' perseverance could finally pay off. S5, Ep12
The Loch Ness Conspiracy. Jeremy explores a revolutionary technique that could identify the Loch Ness Monster. Plus, how did a man survive for several days trapped in a shipwreck? S1, Ep1
Blood in the Morning. On the blue crab grounds, the competition leads to more deceit amongst the captains. Junior's betrayal of his alliance with Keith comes back to haunt him. S9, Ep3
The Crooke & The Tangler. On the blue crab grounds, a high seas showdown between the Saga and Seabrooke takes an unexpected turn. Plus, the Time Bandit has a close call in False Pass. S9, Ep4
The Columbus Treasure. The discovery of a lifetime becomes a massive salvage operation. Pulling up and verifying Columbus' anchor might be the biggest challenge yet. S1, Ep6
The Fortune Of The Buzzard. Josh Gates is on the trail of the legendary lost treasure of the notorious pirate, The Buzzard - a fortune rumoured to be over a billion dollars. S6, Ep17
Lost Tomb Of The Mummy. Josh Gates investigates an active dig site in Egypt. He joins renowned archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass, who is on the cusp on an incredible discovery. S6, Ep19
Bone Dry In Big Sky. The Raneys rescue a single-father homesteader facing threats of rockslides and bears in a Montana box canyon. Marty and Misty face an uphill battle. S4, Ep15
New Digs. Mining on his own and desperate for cash, Dan Measey gambles on new but unproven opal-detecting AI technology. Slim Pickings are forced to relocate. S7, Ep16
School Of Hard Rocks. The Mooka Boys are finally ready to start tunnelling toward black opal glory, until their last working machine suffers a catastrophic breakdown. S7, Ep17
Greenhorn Overboard. Saga and Cornelia Marie battle colossal waves of the supermoon storm. Plus, on the Summer Bay, a deckhand goes over the rail into the icy Bering Sea. S14, Ep16
Turf Wars. Sig pushes Mandy to invade the Cornelia Marie's ground, sparking a battle for the crab. Plus, a Saga distress signal sends panic across the fleet. S14, Ep17
Tiger Triplets. Bindi and the family plan an emotional surprise for Terri in the Crocoseum. Plus, Robert gets stuck in with helping the zoo's three new adorable tiger cubs. S3, Ep2
The Great Turtle Comeback. Following surgery, Olga the ostrich is ready to be reunited with her flock. A new squirrel monkey arrives at the zoo and a crowd-pleasing warthog returns! S4, Ep2
